# Rooval Roofing
> Local residential roofing contractor in Lehi, Utah, serving Utah County and the Salt Lake Valley. Licensed and insured, 5.0-star Google rated. Free roof inspections, honest written quotes, no sales pressure. Phone: (385) 424-8810.

Key facts:
- Services: roof repair, full roof replacement, metal roofing, TPO / flat roofing, gutters, roof tune-ups, and storm-damage inspection and documentation
- A typical full roof replacement on a Utah home runs about $20,000 to $30,000, quoted as one complete project - never per-square rates
- Instant online estimate tool measures your roof from satellite imagery: https://rooval-roofing.com/roof-quote/
- After a storm we inspect the roof, document all damage with photos, and walk the homeowner through the insurance claims paperwork; the homeowner files the claim
- We never offer to waive deductibles or promise a "free roof" - that is illegal in Utah
- Based in Lehi, UT. Open 7 days a week.

## Services
- [Roof Repair](https://rooval-roofing.com/roof-repair-utah/): fast, honest repairs for leaks, wind and hail damage
- [Roof Replacement](https://rooval-roofing.com/roof-replacement-utah/): full tear-off and replacement
- [Roof Replacement Cost Guide](https://rooval-roofing.com/roof-replacement-cost-utah/): honest 2026 Utah pricing and what drives it
- [Hail Damage Repair](https://rooval-roofing.com/hail-damage-repair-utah/)
- [Wind Damage Repair](https://rooval-roofing.com/wind-damage-roof-repair-utah/)
- [Storm Damage Inspection and Documentation](https://rooval-roofing.com/storm-damage-roof-documentation-utah/)
- [Free Roof Inspection](https://rooval-roofing.com/free-roof-inspection-utah/)
- [Metal Roofing](https://rooval-roofing.com/metal-roofing-utah/)
- [TPO / Flat Roofing](https://rooval-roofing.com/tpo-flat-roofing-utah/)
- [Gutter Services](https://rooval-roofing.com/gutter-services-utah/)

## Service areas
Lehi, American Fork, Alpine, Highland, Lindon, Pleasant Grove, Orem, Provo, Springville, Saratoga Springs, Eagle Mountain, Salt Lake City, Murray, Sandy, Draper, Bluffdale
- [All service areas](https://rooval-roofing.com/service-areas/)
